<?php namespace Illuminate\Http\Exceptions; use Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Exception\HttpException; use Throwable; class PostTooLargeException extends HttpException { /** * Create a new "post too large" exception instance. * * @param string $message * @param \Throwable|null $previous * @param array $headers * @param int $code */ public function __construct($message = '', ?Throwable $previous = null, array $headers = [], $code = 0) { parent::__construct(413, $message, $previous, $headers, $code); } }
